rice.sowing_method: Transplant healthy seedlings in puddled fields with 20 x 15 cm spacing.
rice.irrigation_schedule: Maintain shallow standing water during vegetative stage and drain before harvest.
rice.fertilizer_plan: Apply split N doses with basal P and K; include zinc where deficiency exists.
rice.pest_control: Monitor stem borer and leaf folder; use pheromone traps and need-based sprays.
rice.harvest_time: 110-140 days after transplanting depending on variety.

wheat.sowing_method: Line sow at 20-22 cm row spacing using certified seed.
wheat.irrigation_schedule: Critical irrigations at crown root initiation, tillering, flowering and grain filling.
wheat.fertilizer_plan: Apply NPK based on soil test with 2 split N doses.
wheat.pest_control: Scout for rusts and aphids; remove volunteer plants and spray only when threshold crosses.

maize.sowing_method: Sow in ridges at 60 x 20 cm spacing and ensure uniform depth.
maize.irrigation_schedule: Irrigate at knee-high, tasseling and grain filling stages.
maize.fertilizer_plan: Apply 25% N basal and remaining N in 2 top dressings with full P and K.
maize.pest_control: Watch for fall armyworm; use pheromone traps and bio-control with timely action.

chickpea.sowing_method: Sow on conserved moisture fields with seed treatment and Rhizobium inoculation.
chickpea.irrigation_schedule: Usually rainfed; if needed irrigate at flowering and pod formation.
chickpea.fertilizer_plan: Low N, adequate P and sulfur are important; use biofertilizer inoculants.
chickpea.pest_control: Monitor pod borer and wilt; adopt resistant varieties and IPM.

cotton.sowing_method: Use raised beds with recommended hybrid spacing and seed treatment.
cotton.irrigation_schedule: Provide irrigation at square formation, flowering and boll development.
cotton.fertilizer_plan: Balanced NPK with micronutrients, especially boron where deficient.
cotton.pest_control: Follow pink bollworm advisory, install pheromone traps and remove residues.

sugarcane.sowing_method: Plant healthy 2-3 bud setts in furrows at recommended spacing.
sugarcane.irrigation_schedule: Frequent light irrigation early, then at 10-15 day interval by soil moisture.
sugarcane.fertilizer_plan: High nutrient crop; apply FYM and split N with full P and K.
sugarcane.pest_control: Manage early shoot borer and pyrilla with field sanitation and biological control.

groundnut.sowing_method: Sow in well-drained sandy loam with gypsum application at pegging.
groundnut.irrigation_schedule: Irrigate at flowering, pegging and pod development.
groundnut.fertilizer_plan: Apply basal NPK with calcium and sulfur support.
groundnut.pest_control: Watch leaf miner and tikka disease; use resistant varieties and timely sprays.

millet.sowing_method: Direct seed in lines on light soils with good drainage.
millet.irrigation_schedule: Needs minimal irrigation; provide at booting if dry spell persists.
millet.fertilizer_plan: Moderate N with basal P and K; incorporate organic manure.
millet.pest_control: Use seed treatment and keep field weed-free in early growth.

pigeonpeas.sowing_method: Sow in wide rows for better branching and intercropping options.
pigeonpeas.irrigation_schedule: Mostly rainfed; one protective irrigation at flowering helps.
pigeonpeas.fertilizer_plan: Apply starter N and adequate P with Rhizobium culture.
pigeonpeas.pest_control: Monitor pod borer and pod fly; use traps and need-based control.

mungbean.sowing_method: Line sow with quality seed after seed treatment.
mungbean.irrigation_schedule: 2-3 irrigations at branching and pod filling in dry periods.
mungbean.fertilizer_plan: Low N and good phosphorus with biofertilizer inoculation.
mungbean.pest_control: Control whitefly and yellow mosaic through resistant varieties and vector management.

blackgram.sowing_method: Sow in lines with proper seed treatment and Rhizobium culture.
blackgram.irrigation_schedule: Irrigate at flowering and pod filling if rainfall is low.
blackgram.fertilizer_plan: Apply basal P and sulfur with low starter nitrogen.
blackgram.pest_control: Watch for leaf curl and sucking pests; use yellow sticky traps.

lentil.sowing_method: Sow in fine seedbed at shallow depth with proper spacing.
lentil.irrigation_schedule: Usually one irrigation at pre-flowering in dry soils.
lentil.fertilizer_plan: Apply phosphorus-rich basal dose and biofertilizers.
lentil.pest_control: Manage rust and wilt with resistant seeds and crop rotation.

banana.sowing_method: Plant healthy tissue-culture plants on raised beds with mulching.
banana.irrigation_schedule: Drip irrigation at regular intervals based on evapotranspiration.
banana.fertilizer_plan: Monthly split fertigation with NPK and micronutrients.
banana.pest_control: Control weevils and sigatoka via sanitation and integrated sprays.

mango.sowing_method: Plant grafted saplings in well-prepared pits at orchard spacing.
mango.irrigation_schedule: Irrigate young trees frequently; mature trees at flowering/fruit set.
mango.fertilizer_plan: Apply FYM and age-based NPK doses annually.
mango.pest_control: Monitor hopper and powdery mildew; prune canopy and spray as advised.
mango.harvest_time: 3-5 years for regular yield after planting.

coffee.sowing_method: Transplant nursery plants under shade with contour planting.
coffee.irrigation_schedule: Provide blossom and backing irrigation during dry spells.
coffee.fertilizer_plan: Split NPK with organic matter and liming where needed.
coffee.pest_control: Monitor berry borer and rust; maintain shade balance and IPM.
coffee.harvest_time: 3-4 years after planting for commercial picking.

jute.sowing_method: Broadcast or line sow in warm humid fields with fine tilth.
jute.irrigation_schedule: Keep soil moist; avoid prolonged waterlogging.
jute.fertilizer_plan: Apply organic manure with balanced NPK before sowing.
jute.pest_control: Monitor stem rot and semilooper; maintain drainage and timely protection.
